# X's Auto Salon, LLC

> Professional auto and marine detailing for cars, boats, and jet skis.

X's Auto Salon, LLC provides detailing services that clean, restore, and protect vehicles and watercraft.

Website: https://www.xsautosalon.com/
Phone: 401.699.1133
Email: xsautosalon@gmail.com

## Services

- Auto detailing
- Exterior hand wash
- Interior detailing
- Wax and paint protection
- Buff and polish
- Ceramic coating
- Wet sanding
- Wheel, tire, and trim detailing
- Carpet and upholstery shampoo
- Boat detailing
- Jet ski detailing
- Marine interior cleaning
- Marine polish and surface care
- Marine protection services

## Important Pages

- Home: https://www.xsautosalon.com/
- Services: https://www.xsautosalon.com/#services
- Gallery: https://www.xsautosalon.com/#gallery
- About: https://www.xsautosalon.com/#about
- Contact: https://www.xsautosalon.com/#contact

## Preferred Summary

X's Auto Salon, LLC offers professional auto and marine detailing services for cars, boats, and jet skis, including washing, polishing, interior cleaning, ceramic coating, paint protection, and marine surface protection.
